reclassification.reason: Repository evidence includes Eclipse runtime command/view implementation, Java hardening test suites, headless smoke checks and CI lane integration.
Repository now includes runnable TUI and Neovim MVP runtime entrypoints with smoke evidence; Vim compatibility remains explicitly deferred.
Repository now includes VS Code extension runtime entrypoint, command/view implementation, smoke tests, CI lane, and merge-readiness evidence.

correction_note: Earlier completion claims overstated runnable client status. Runtime claims now require executable evidence, and Eclipse now qualifies as runtime_mvp with hardening and merge-readiness evidence.
